name: swe-process
description: Governed concept-to-design, ADR, phase-plan, and feature-plan workflows for repositories using the SWE artifact layout.

interface.longDescription: Creates reviewable design, architecture-decision, phase-plan, and feature-plan artifacts from the repository SWE process.
defaultPrompt: Use $swe-design to turn my concepts into a governed design.
Use $swe-plan to plan this phase and its feature work.
Use $swe-feature to create an implementation-ready feature plan.
